text: I feel as though I occupy a liminal space—passing through sleek, modern corridors and then pausing in front of a bold, thoughtful wall that reflects on research, development, and our evolving relationship with technology. The immaculate glass walls and the organized displays induce a sense of clarity and order, yet standing here, I feel a quiet awe—reminded that every innovation is also a question about how to connect and coexist. This place is contemplative, almost reverent, cultivating in me a sense of gentle curiosity and belonging to the ongoing story of human ingenuity.
